title: Krosno Red Wine Glasses | Set of 6 | 490 ML | Avant-Garde Collection | Lead-Free Crystal Glass | for Home, Restaurants & Parties | Dishwasher Safe
features: LEAD-FREE CRYSTAL GLASS – High-quality glass not only presents the contents of the glasses in a beautiful way, but also makes them extremely durable and resistant to mechanical damage or clouding.
SET OF 6 GLASSES - Our elegant red wine glasses combine attractive design and functionality. Long stems prevent the drink from being warmed by hand.
FINE CONNECTION OF THE STEM WITH THE BOWL AND BASE - The slender shape and fine connection of the stem with the bowl and base will delight lovers of minimalism and elegant simplicity.

550 ML TOTAL VOLUME - This perfectly transparent glass has a total volume of 550 ml and a usable capacity of 490 ml, a height of 240 mm and a diameter of 99 mm. The large capacity and the interesting shape of the bowl ensure optimal contact between the wine and the air, releasing its unique aromas.

EUROPEAN GLASS MANUFACTURER - KROSNO is a renowned European glass manufacturer specializing in the production of beautiful glass products for homes worldwide. Our glass is of exceptional quality and is crafted by highly skilled artisans who are passionate about their work. This means that every piece of glass has a unique character, no matter the occasion.
description: Product Description Avant Garde Collection The Avant-garde line is characterized by elegance and unique style. It combines interesting design and functionality, and the unique shape of the bowl makes it stand out from the entire range. Glass from this collection is ideally suited to the products served, thanks to which it allows you to properly celebrate their tasting. Total Capacity: 550 ML Height: 240 mm Diameter: 99 mm Lead-free Crystal Glass Crystalline glass is a material that combines the elegance of crystal with the practical properties of modern glass. It is characterized by exceptional clarity, a subtle shine, and increased resistance to scratches and mechanical damage. It is lighter than traditional crystal while being extremely durable. Ideal for glasses, tumblers, and carafes – perfect for everyday use as well as special occasions. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup.
